title: Ecbolium campestre
intro: Ecbolium campestre, also known as Field Ecbolium or Wild Ecbolium, is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae, characterized by its hairy stems and purple flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Ecbolium campestre include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Ecbolium campestre is often used to make herbal teas and infusions, as well as extracts and tinctures, which are used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of various health conditions.
